_comment: Auto-loaded by Claude Code when plugin enabled. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is injected at runtime as the plugin's install dir, so the same hooks.json works on any machine. -WindowStyle Hidden suppresses the brief window flash on each hook fire (Windows). -NonInteractive prevents prompt dialogs. async:true (v0.6.2+) tells Claude Code not to wait for hook to exit; eliminates user-visible 470ms PS5.1 cold-start block per H13a research finding. HAE hooks always exit 0 + don't use stdout context injection, so async is safe.
